testcase.name: Select the first checkbox
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Select the first checkbox # features/checkbox.feature:3 Given I open the checkboxes page # com.eci.myproject.steps.CheckboxSteps.openCheckboxPage() When I select the first checkbox # com.eci.myproject.steps.CheckboxSteps.selectCheckbox() Then the first checkbox should be selected # com.eci.myproject.steps.CheckboxSteps.verifyCheckbox()
testcase.system-err: Mar 15, 2026 6:47:36 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Mar 15, 2026 6:47:36 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.80. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.19.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's. testcase.name: Select an option from the dropdown
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Select an option from the dropdown # features/dropdown.feature:3 Given I am on the dropdown page # com.eci.myproject.steps.DropdownSteps.i_am_on_the_dropdown_page() When I select "Option 1" from the dropdown # com.eci.myproject.steps.DropdownSteps.i_select_from_the_dropdown(java.lang.String) Then I should see "Option 1" selected # com.eci.myproject.steps.DropdownSteps.i_should_see_selected(java.lang.String)

testcase.name: Search for a term
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Search for a term # features/google_search.feature:3 Given I am on the Google search page # com.eci.myproject.steps.SearchSteps.i_am_on_the_google_search_page() When I search for "GitHub" # com.eci.myproject.steps.SearchSteps.i_search_for(java.lang.String) Then I should see "GitHub" in the results # com.eci.myproject.steps.SearchSteps.i_should_see_in_the_results(java.lang.String)

testcase.name: Successful login
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Successful login # features/login.feature:3 Given I open the login page # com.eci.myproject.steps.LoginSteps.openLoginPage() When I enter valid username and password # com.eci.myproject.steps.LoginSteps.enterCredentials() And I click the login button # com.eci.myproject.steps.LoginSteps.clickLoginButton() Then I should see the secure area # com.eci.myproject.steps.LoginSteps.verifyLogin()
